moonlight.skill_details:
color-header{moonlight:Star of the Nightsky}
DMG: +25.0% for 12.0 sec: stacks up to x1
Starlight Periodic DMG: up to x10 ticks for 1.8 sec; %{attr1} DMG per tick
Additional Starlight DMG: 5.5% of Max HP (Cookies)
Starlight ignoring DMG Resist: 40.0%
color-header{moonlight:Moonlight of the Nightsky}
DMG (Cookies): 125.0% of ATK + 3.0% of true DMG proportional to Max HP + Sleep for 2.0 sec
DMG (Others): 255.0% of ATK + Sleep for 2.0 sec
status{Drowsy} Drowsiness: ATK SPD -15.0%, MOV SPD -15.0% for 15.0 sec
color-header{moonlight:Dreaming Moon}
status{Healing} Self-healing: 29.8% of ATK
moonlight.skill_notes:
Regular attack deals % ATK DMG to the nearest target.
color-header{moonlight:Star of the Nightsky}
Moonlight Cookie becomes intangible while using her skill.
color-header{moonlight:Moonlight of the Nightsky}
The projectile is not affected by ATK SPD changes.
color-header{moonlight:Dreaming Moon}
Moonlight Cookie restores her own HP after the skill duration and after receiving Sleep effects.
moonlight.rally_effects:
color-header{moonlight:Rally Effect}
color-header{moonlight:Moonlight's Protection}
status{Debuff_Resist} Team gains Debuff Resist +%{attr1} upon entering battle
status{Debuff_Resist} Team gains extra Debuff Resist +20.0% for 3 sec when Moonlight Cookie uses her skill

moonlight_cj.skill_details:
color-header{moonlight:Brilliant Starlight}
Periodic DMG: x10 ticks over 1.8 sec, 33.0% DMG per tick
DMG (Cookies): %{attr2} of Max HP
DMG Resist Bypass: 35.0%
Extra DMG: +25.0% for 12 sec; stacks up to x1
status{Sleep}: 2.5 sec
Drowsy: ATK SPD -20.0%, MOV SPD -20.0% for 15 sec
color-header{moonlight:Gleaming Moonlight}
Periodic DMG (Cookies): x3 ticks over 0.9 sec, %{attr3} DMG per tick + 2.0% True DMG proportional to Max HP
Periodic DMG (Others): x3 ticks over 0.9 sec, 255.0% DMG per tick
color-header{moonlight:Night Sky}
status{Amplify_Buff} Moonlight Cookie's Amplify Buff: +30.0%
Moonlight Cookie Immune to Sleep & Drowsy
Moonlight Cookie Self-Healing: 5.5% of ATK when affected by Sleep
moonlight_cj.skill_notes:
color-header{moonlight:Moonlight's Protection} (Rally Effect)
Debuff Resist gained from the Rally Effect is undispellable.
color-header{moonlight:Brilliant Starlight}
Each tick of damage inflicts Sleep, refreshing it on application. This results in Sleep being applied for a longer duration per skill cast than shown.

enchants.moonlight_10:
Activates the Radiant Crescent:
Extra DMG to Gleaming Moonlight Targets: 103.2% of ATK
Gleaming Moonlight DMG Resist Bypass: 35.0%
enchants.moonlight_20:
Sends Falling Stars upon up to five targets of Brilliant Starlight with the highest ATK, dealing DMG equal to 144.0% of ATK
Skill DMG Resist Bypass: +1.7% per each 1% of Cooldown decreased with Beascuits; capped at 30.0%
enchants.moonlight_30:
Augmented by the full moon's radiance, Falling Stars deal area damage:
Falling Stars Area DMG: 107.7% of ATK
